name: todoist-markdown-sync
description: Bidirectional sync between Todoist and ~/Desktop/todoist-tasks.md. Checks off tasks in Todoist when marked done in the markdown, creates new Todoist tasks when added to the markdown, and keeps the file up-to-date with all active Todoist tasks.
prompt:
Run the Todoist bidirectional sync script. Execute:

```
python3 /Users/davidneil/Desktop/Projects/agent-orchestrator/.agent/scripts/todoist-sync.py
```

This script will:
1. Fetch all active tasks from Todoist
2. Scan ~/Desktop/todoist-tasks.md for any tasks the user has checked off → complete them in Todoist
3. Scan for any new task lines the user added (no <!-- tid:... --> tag) → create them in Todoist (Inbox)
4. Rebuild the markdown file with the current live state from Todoist

If the script fails due to a missing dependency, install it with `pip3 install requests` and retry. Report any errors clearly.
